MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryan Lamb, Esq. 415-997-9529 of Lamb & Frischer Law Firm for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court asks questions.Moving party responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAMB & FRISCHER LAW FIRM, AND ATTY. BRYAN D. LAMB'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

The Court finds that there is compliance with 3.1362, there are no other parties to be served. The motion is Granted.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling on the mandatory judicial council form.

Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/NL)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to JAN-29-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
